skill1.kitLine: Activates when landing Full Charge attacks on targets within the effective range. Affects all allies. ATK ▲ 15.2% of the skill user's ATK for 5 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[0]: trigger shotFired → allies casterAtkPct 15.2 dur 5
skill1.note: shotFired is a PROXY for 'landing Full Charge within effective range' — no full-charge trigger exists in types.ts; range condition assumed always-true (engine noRange). ⚑ unmeasured.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when attacking with Full Charge. Affects self. Spy Lens: Minimum Effective Range ▲ 4.44%, stacks up to 10 time(s) and lasts for 5 sec.
skill1.note: Inert range stat — engine sets noRange universally, so Min Effective Range changes have no damage channel. Stack COUNT is indirectly represented via skill2[1] hitCount count:10 gate.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when landing a Full Charge attack on a target within the effective range. Affects all allies. Pierce Damage ▲ 18.36% for 5 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[0]: trigger shotFired → allies pierceDamagePct 18.36 dur 5
skill2.note: Same shotFired full-charge proxy as S1. pierceDamagePct feeds Damage Up for pierce-tagged attackers; she is one via hasPierce.

skill2.kitLine: Activates only if Spy Lens is at max stacks. Affects self. Gains Pierce. This effect is continuous.
skill2.note: Boolean flag cannot be step-gated — applies from t=0 instead of after 10 stacks (~16s). Residual structural gap acknowledged in caveats. Overstates pierce tag for first ~16s.

skill2.where: skill2[1]: trigger hitCount count:10 → self atkPct 16 (no duration = continuous)
skill2.note: Faithful step-gate via hitCount count:10 (added 2026-07-17, theme 3). Replaces prior always-on-from-t=0 encoding. count:10 rests on 1 stack/full-charge assumption (⚑).

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Minimum Effective Range ▲ 55.56% for 10 sec.
burst.note: Inert range stat — range buffs change the effective-range band, not shots fired; no shot-count channel in engine. Hard-rule-1 check done per note.

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Attack Damage ▲ 55.04% for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[0]: trigger burstCast → allies attackDamagePct 55.04 dur 10
burst[0]: trigger burstCast → allies pierceDamagePct 10.13 dur 10
burst.note: Second effect in same burst block. Feeds pierce-tagged allies' Damage Up bucket.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1 + skill2: team ATK and Pierce Damage buffs keyed to shotFired proxy for 'landing Full Charge attacks within effective range' — assumes every trigger pull is a landed full charge
documentedConfounds.why: In auto-play SR always fires full charge at a target in range; the proxy is structurally faithful for the sim's scope. No missed-shot or out-of-range channel exists.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: hasPierce top-level flag (Spy-Lens-max-gated) applies from t=0 — boolean flag can't be step-gated, residual structural gap
documentedConfounds.why: Overstates pierce tag for ~16s of a 180s fight (~9%). Pierce tag only matters if pierceDamagePct buffs are active, which also ramp via the same proxy. Net impact small.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: hitCount count:10 rests on 1 stack per full-charge SR hit + ⚑ SR cadence (chargeFrames 60, bolt-gap 22f, reloadFrames 141)
documentedConfounds.why: Datamine values for SR cadence; if actual cadence differs the 10-stack onset shifts by seconds, but the ATK 16% buff is continuous once active so only the onset window is affected.

documentedConfounds.text: cadence: SR bolt-gap (22f) + chargeFrames 60 + reloadFrames 141 are datamine defaults — verify autofire/rounds-per-minute/reload from video
documentedConfounds.why: These are weapon-table datamine values shared across all SR units. Unlikely to be wrong, but unverified against video.

documentedConfounds.text: Spy Lens: Minimum Effective Range ▲ 4.44% × 10 stacks (skill1) and Minimum Effective Range ▲ 55.56% (burst) — both inert range stats
documentedConfounds.why: Engine sets noRange universally; range stats have no damage channel. Correctly excluded. Stack count is indirectly captured via hitCount gate.

documentedConfounds.text: PARSER BASELINE banner: entire model is HYPOTHESIS, not validated. Every ⚑ is an unmeasured estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number.
documentedConfounds.why: Board shows ratio 1.001 on N=1 team — consistent with the model being approximately correct, but N=1 is thin evidence. The banner is a process flag, not a known mechanical gap.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Ade: Agent Bunny as a B2 SR support whose full-charge shots buff team ATK (15.2% caster ATK) and Pierce Damage (18.36%), with a burst adding Attack Damage 55.04% + Pierce Damage 10.13% to all allies. The Spy Lens range stacks are correctly excluded as inert (noRange engine), but their stack count gates the self ATK +16% buff via a faithful hitCount count:10 step. The key approximation is the shotFired proxy for 'landing Full Charge within effective range' (structurally sound for auto-play SR) and the hasPierce boolean applying from t=0 instead of after 10 stacks (~16s onset gap). All kit lines are accounted for — nothing is silently dropped. The model is flagged as PARSER BASELINE (unvalidated hypothesis), though the single-team board ratio of 1.001 suggests it is approximately correct.
